Our Practice · 01

Senior engineering, end-to-end — without the agency markup.

01 / AI-native software

Production-grade AI features, not demos.

We design, prototype, and ship AI-first products and internal tools — retrieval, agents, evals, and the unglamorous plumbing that makes them actually hold up under load.

02 / Systems & platform

Forecasting, analytics, and ERP work.

Data platforms, BI pipelines, forecasting systems, and ERP selection & rollout. We've owned $75M/yr pipelines and led seven-figure enterprise rollouts end-to-end.

03 / Fractional leadership

Requirements, stakeholders, regulators.

We work directly with founders and executives on requirements, customer discovery, unblocking teams, and navigating compliance and bureaucracy in regulated industries.

Our team · 02

Chris

Co-founder · Engineering

Product-minded engineer who has shipped across mobile, AI, real estate, and oil & gas. Spends his time between a terminal and a whiteboard — and quite often, an espresso cup.
